method_summary: A retrieval-augmented framework using open-weight reasoning models with retrieved news articles and academic paper abstracts to assign AI exposure labels to occupation-task pairs in O*NET 30.2
key_innovation: Using external evidence (news articles and academic abstracts) to ground AI exposure measurements rather than relying solely on model priors
best_result: The grounded condition is preferred in over 72% of disagreement cases under both automatic and human evaluation
limitations_stated: AI capabilities continue to change, requiring periodic reassessment of measurements
title: Jobs'AI Exposure Should Be Measured from Evidence, Not Model Priors
